bug_report.summary: Project Settings search for `display/display_server/driver.linuxbsd` shows no results (setting not visible/accessible)
steps_to_reproduce: Open the project in the editor.
Navigate to Display → Display Server (if not already selected).
expected_behaviors: The `display/display_server/driver.linuxbsd` project setting is shown in the results list.
The setting can be edited via a strict dropdown/selector (non-editable enum), allowing the user to pick a valid value (e.g., `x11`).
actual_behaviors: The main Project Settings panel is empty (no settings/results shown), so `display/display_server/driver.linuxbsd` cannot be found or changed via the UI.
